The '''Chiaki''' was a large snake-like predator native to the oceans of [[Iskalon/Legends|Iskalon]]. While their [[Diet/Legends|diet]] consisted primarily of other aquatic creatures, the chiaki were not at all opposed to capturing the unwary [[Iskalonian]] for their next meal. Like [[Shark/Legends|sharks]], this beast hunted by scenting blood in the water.

{{Creature-stub}}
